text: I switched from AT&T to T mobile to save money. The staff in the Barnum Ave store were helpful but a bit deceptive in their sales. They told me I was eligible for free phones not mentioning the condition of the phone. they completed the paperwork and then there was a small crack on the back of one of my phones Iphone 10 the other one is in perfect condition so after the paperwork was done they said they couldn’t give me the phones but could give me the buy one get one AFTER the paperwork was processed. I am disgusted and am now paying $30 MORE per month.
Anthony from Shakopee MN was awesome and resolved all questions/concerns!
Tmobile offers unlimited plan but you barely get connected to internet. Its cheaper because your paying a service thats is not working well. Its a mistake swutching from at&t to tmobile

My mother went by herself to get us phone service which was a big mistake the guy there basically sold her every little Doohickey he could that we didn’t even need and we couldn’t return we went on Amazon and found the same products for a fraction of the cost we called T-Mobile customer service and could not receive any help from anyone they did Nied having doing any wrong I would never choose T-Mobile I would never tell someone to choose T-Mobile this was a horrible experience for two years now we have been in a contract that has not served us at all and on TV I watch commercials about other services companies that provide discounts and free things and all types of deals which we didn’t get one type of deal at all with T-Mobile. We paid full price for three phones we paid full price for service for two years we paid full price for everything I feel so taken advantage of it’s not even funny. My poor mother! Extremely disappointed and frustrated never choose T-Mobile ever again for anything!!!
This is the worst network providers in the world!! Even providers in 3rd world countries are far better than T-Mobile

Tmobile experts my left toenail. 3rd time not a charm. THEY LIE. say "free" to close the deal then you get a $275 bill for the "free" equipment. Billing wrong and over charged EVERY single month. Hours on the phone twice a month to correct. I was told it was corrected and here comes another outrageous bill for products and services that I never ordered or received. Don't Don't Don't fall for it. They are horrible!! Hidden charges??? You bet in spades. All three experiences with them over 10 years exactly the same. Oh! And let's not talk about their 5g network that drops calls and crashes your phone internet. They are "expert" rip-offs and liars. Straight Talk. No issues and very affordable and fabulous customer service. No taxes, hidden fees, wrong billing, hours on the phone with dummies, dropped calls and service coverage better than anyone else that I've used. 83% of reviews are bad. Go figure. Have an awesome day ya'all!!!

Have been a Sprint customer for approximately 10yrs, and now a T-mobile customer due to the "merger". T-mobile contacted me and happily offered us, my wife and I, new 5g sim cards for our current phones at no cost which we accepted. Unbeknownst to us our current phones were'nt even 5g compatible and we have had poor signal since. I contacted TM and they happily offered to upgrade our phones for us at no charge. As it turns out, after 1.5hrs on the phone, there were costs associated with the upgrades and also we would be getting locked into a 2 year contract with TM. Highly deceptive and I would not be surprised if this was happening to former Sprint customers on a grand scale. I told TM they could keep their upgrades and contract and to send me replacement sim cards. They are doing this. Free of charge of course. My wife and I will be looking at a new SP in the near future. Again, highly deceptive practices going on at T-Mobile, lawyers take note. Although they assured me that measures would be taking place so that nothing like this would happen again and management was looking into immediately.... I call bs

The service sucks. Cant make calls without dropping and internet is horrible. Cant stream anything. They are cheap service but maybe thats why. Im going to switch with verizon they cost more but it will work.
Attention very bad 👎 😡😡😡😡

If I could give them negative stars I would! They messed up my phone order twice and still expected me to pay for their mistakes. I was originally sent the incorrect phone, then they sent the correct phone but messed up my plan and charged me for the entire phone at once. I have never heard of a company that “strives” for customer service but does the complete opposite. I wouldn’t recommend signing up for service with them

They did not work with me allowing me to set up an alternative payment plan and charged me 40 dollars when an issue I had came to light with my bank for not having a payment plan.  Also they offered me a free line to latter charge me for it saying that the person who offered it should not have worest customer service Thomas Duryee
If I could give it a 0 I would. They charged me on the way out 26 days for service that I'm not receiving. Highway robbery. Will never do business with this company again.

Sent me a smart watch 2 months late that was free. Watch band was too small, told me I could exchange it for larger watch and band. Sent small watch back, next day went to order larger watch and they told me it was 299 instead of straight exchange. If they had told the truth I would have kept smaller watch and bought a larger band. Now they won't send me the small watch back. They also were trying sigh me up for a free line, which I later found outvwas not free. They lie to you to push their products and to take back what they gave you free.
Ever since they merged with Metro PCS the cell service has gone down hill significantly. I never have service anywhere and I’m not even in rural areas.

the customer service number SUCKS they need to learn to help their customers. I was on the chat with a expert and all they did was kept looking at my messages and I told them over and over I couldn't log into my account and they ignored. TMOBILE YOU SUCK.

Two employees working inside, waiting waiting with at least 6 people waiting to be helped. Terrible customer service. I may change my service in the next few weeks. You should have better service when you enter store. “I’ll be with you in a minute” shouldn’t mean 45 minutes later, poor service.

I got a question. Is it an invasion of privacy. Is it proper protocol? when you go into T-Mobile(or now sprint also) they ask you for your driver's license and you comply. They  take a picture of you and your driver's license. Sometimes your driver's license is all. That bothers me.

Edit☆ updated from 2 stars to 5

 ok so they called me back I'm so glad- a supervisor reviewed one of my bad surveys and reviewed my case. She called this morning / apologized and took care of my issue with no problem- this is the TMobile I've known for years.. so grateful!!


1st/ initial review-
I'm being generous I've been with tmobile for 14 yrs - added family as well. Up until recently the customer service has been great now.. not at all. Instead of customer service being accountable for issues - the issues are passed on for others to handle [ and noone calls me back to update me] I was in customer  service for 20 yrs- never a good sign when customer service goes downhill/ every customer should matter..Got me rethinking my loyalty

DO NOT GO WITH T MOBILE.they lie to you about their plans or they don't know 
what the plans include. recently went with them was told that I would get a discount for netflick. told thr salesperson I already had netflix and was told that was not a problem.
after 2 mo tjs of not getting the discount I called customer service. I was told that the plan I had did not include the discount also was told to get the discount I would have to cancel netflix and change plans. seems all they care about is the sale.  I would recommend you not to go with tmobe. if I could leave without getting a hit on payments I would
The service in T-Mobile Greenbelt  Maryland were superb. The 2 ladies were very helpful, quick and very thorough. Thanks.

Great coverage overseas with no additional charges. Terrible service. Calls drop.  Calls won't connect. I can't hear the caller. T-Mobile says that they are trying to get more towers and sent a booster to my house. I gave up.
I recommend mobile expert, Jorden Davis who works in Okemos store ( 3GSU) . he is very professional, polite, quick and helpful. thank you

Web site says customer service available 24hrs a day but you call and a are told call back later. I just tried a joy2 junk and this p I s s poor is a direct reflection of how crappie t- mobile has become. A dollar 98 drive through dive. Again I would never recommend T-unmoble to anyone...

I'VE BEEN A CUSTOMER, AS HAVE MOST OF MY FAMILY, FOR NINETEEN YEARS!!  Never have I experienced the NEW Institutionalized Horrid customer service as I have these past few months.  1. T-Mobile lie about team of experts: DURING daytime work hours I get ONLY foreign customer service agents that do not understand simple concepts and take minimum three times what an American CS agent would take to resolve simple issues. It is extremely frustrating and triggers Anxiety and PTSD issues! 2. Repeated lies by CS agents & even supposed supervisors! BROKEN PROMISES.
Had good experience with T mobile today. Noah and Skyler were very helpful, professional ,& accommodating. 1st time customer......Thank you, Beth

This is the most incredibly screwed up communications carrier in the history of telecommunications.  The website customer portal is perpetually dysfunctional.  The interactive voice response system is completely dysfunctional.  I have two phones on t-mobile and neither one of my phone numbers is even recognized on their system.  T-Mobile means Terrifically - MOre BILE.  After 7 years I've had enough.  I'm getting out. T-Mobile needs to get the business version of the Darwin Award.

I have been with Sprint since 1997 and they have now been bought out by TMobile.  They just "migrated" my voicemail.  NOW I CAN'T RECEIVE VOICEMAILS WHEN I FORWARD THE BUSINESS OFFICE PHONE TO MY CELL PHONE.  The forward works if you answer it, but if you can't, CLIENTS CANNOT LEAVE A VOICEMAIL when it's forwarded.  They get "the mailbox is invalid".  After 6 weeks of working with tech support, the answer is that Tmobile does not support this service.  That is a detriment to ANY business that forwards their phones to a TMobile cell phone then. I suggest you take that into advisement when considering this phone company.  I forward my phones when I go out of town or even leave the office at night and this is a significant problem.

We were with Tmobile for 15 years until we finally had enough of the dropped calls, inability to speak on a clear line with my husband (whose on the plan with me), non service areas and the all around crap service in their stores. We switched carriers, got the final bill for the 10 days of service we had, but with no credit for the additional 20 days they billed. Called in to find out why and was told "we don't prorate, it's in the terms and conditions...." you know the 15 pages they print and give you after you sign and set up service over 15 years ago! Thank you for showing a loyal customer your fat middle finger!

I'm so disappointed in the fact T-Mobile wants to take over what was the BEST service for my husband and I when we live out in the country. They had me so convinced that they have the best service now, right? They are coming out with the 5G and all... So we both had the iPhone X and we switched are sim cards because well T-Mobile is going to be taking over anyway, and the agent for Sprint told me it was okay to switch over and went ahead and sent us the cards, so when we switched we didn't have any problems with our phones except when we went anywhere the service was horrible. It was running so slow, so yes Sprint for us was wayyyy better. So went ended up going to the T-Mobile store that use to be Sprint, and they tried switching our SIM cards back to Sprint and guess what happened?!?! IT BROKE MY PHONE! Then my husband had to ACTUALLY end up buying a whole new phone because the service wouldn't work on his X. Thankfully mine was free to replace but still... I had to go a whole two days without a phone. BS COMPANY I SWEAR. So obviously eventually I will have to buy a newer phone to get this stupid 5G network. UGHHHHH.

I have contacted them too many times to count because internet isn’t working and blind Transfers  for person to person who does nothing. And start all over each time they even acknowledge you told them the issues then blind transfer again. Then told by a manager they would fix didn’t. They lose your auto pay info and you have to give  your personal info again to a person in India that’s busy with chickens and internet doesn’t work either with Team mobile after being on the phone for 1 hour. Poorest service  I have ever had ever

T-Mobile contacted me and "promised" T-Mobile Home Internet was available. I received the 5G Home Internet router and setup went smoothly. The router then reported my signal was weak. After relocating the device throughout my home, I attempted to contact Home Internet Support. After 2 hours on hold, I had to hang up. No service. No options!

Two calls, two dropped calls. when I call customer service they say they're not total drop calls they're half drop calls. The other person can hear me I just can't hear them. half a drop call. how fun! T-Mobile sucks!
T-Mobile is billing me even though I do not have an account with T-Mobile. A company rep said she couldn't help me, then hung up on me.
Bad bad bad we are going back to Metro store on hwy 78 in Stone Mountain Ga suck We in store today everybody go on lunch at the same time.y’all stay away from  T bad mobile
This is the worst service ever.  I was with Sprint now merged with T-mobile. If your in a 5G area the service is worse the LTE. They should be giving ever customer some sort of refund!

I would never recommend T-Mobile to anyone I just signed up with them and what the gentleman on the phone told me when I signed up is way different than hassle and run around I've been getting since I've been trying to change this phone that he highly recommended that I hate but I can't seem to get rid of it now don't go there because if it sounds too good to be true it usually is

Im extremely  angry at tmovil..for  not help me with my cell phones  service  at my apt.i have complained  many  times non of my four lines work it is extremely  frosted  that we have to go two tree block to get service sometimes  not even that work..customer service  seen like they were  going  to fix my problem  but until  now nothing. We're still using my kids hotspot  from school  ...like I told them att..and metro..and Sprint  work fine but you're best network like you said in you're  commercials  Said s is the best is not I have been with you guys for 16 + years in still waiting.....

 help me ...now........carlos

We were on Sprint before T-Mobile purchased them. Once T-Mobile took over their network we began having problems. We took our LG G6 phone to T-Mobile & they broke our device, then replaced it with a series of defective phones from Assurant, their insurance co that sends you refurbished phones that don't work. When you complain, you get a run around. We finally went with a different carrier and we are very happy with the phone service we are now getting.

I was a former sprint customer. On 3-29-21 I switched to T-Mobile to save money and it has been a nightmare ever since. They lied to me from the Philippines and now all 3 of my phones are of no use. They switched me not verifying that my phones would be compatible with their network and guess what, they are not, even though they told me that my phones were good to go. I went to local store and they were of no help as well and very rude representatives there as well. They blamed me because I called the 888 number off of a flyer that I received in the mail. The manager told me that they are a complete different part of T-Mobile and that I should of known better. What a completely awful thing to say to a person. So, today, 04-10-21, I still have no service and now I am going out to buy new phones. They refused after days and hours to admit any fault and all you get from their reps are "so sorry" but they did nothing. They should be replacing my phones, not me. And Sprint will NOT take me back. I begged and begged for a number to call within the states but they refused to give me one. I have spent a total of 46 hours trying to get T-Mobile to take responsibility for their representative and they will NOT. The level of AWFUL customer service is worse than I have ever encountered and believe me, the cable in my house is right at the top of the list for overseas terrible customer service. So, to save you the frustration and agony and not being taken by a company that obviously DOES NOT CARE, DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH THESE PEOPLE.

I have a note corn plus that was having all types of issues so I went into the store and they told me this s21 Ultra would solve all my problems but the problem is it still has the same problems and even more.
5G is slower then 2g

edits.text:
I have been with T-Mobile for 7 years now and gradually get the worse and worse quality of service and product. They convinced me to upgrade to the newer phone and state it will solve all my problems and when I go back and show them that it's not solved the problem and that it is reoccurring they blame it on myself or the device that's attached to it which is an earpiece and it's always someone else's fault. I purchased the phone 2 weeks ago and I have already had to have a warranty replacement sent out now I am experiencing the same problem. 
Now I am told it is too late for me to return the phone that is not very effective if you are trying to multitask.
Now using Samsung S21 ultra. Useless

text: Possibly the worst customer service and billing experience possible for home internet.   They are clueless in customer support.   I waited for hours and hours on hold only to listen for someone for 15 minutes explain they weren't at fault for cutting my service off after 26 days for something that I signed up for re-occurring.   I am returning the home internet device after using it for 1 weekend.   I loved the free trial hot spot for  30 days.   Unfortunately PAYING for the services resulted in nothing by heart ache as they couldn't keep the service up.
The 5g coverage and quality Is so terrible I have to manually switch to 4g in 99% of the places I go, if I don't switch manually it will show as I have no service whatsoever.

After buying into their advertising promises  of 5G and lower prices I switched back to Verizon. There so called 5G was slower that Verizon's 4G. I also bought into their home internet which did not work. You absolutely cannot get any customer service and it was a nightmare just trying to cancel it. This company has the worst customer service I have ever seen. Don't just believe my review but the other ones I did not heed. One of the worst decisions I ever made.

Tried to switch from Verizon to Tmobile.
Went ok till i received my 1 new phone and one sim card for the phone i was bringing. I realized the sim card they sent for the one i was bringing had not been ported with my number. So i called and person said no there was no porting of my number scheduled. So they started the port 24hrs later no cell signal, called another 24 hrs later again and was told they could not escalate or prioritize the porting to wait another 24hrs. Well at this point going 2 days with no cell service was not an option so i called Verizon and told them my situation and they worked on it and after a few hours and calls my account and phone number was recovered and i once again had a working cell phone.
The difference between Tmobile kids literally kids who dont seem to care and Verizon who have real adults who care is huge and worth the extra money for me. So glad I didn’t lose my number and have to start over with a new number. “You get what you pay for”.
P.S. They try to trick you into buying all the extras like insurance, phone case etc., as if you must but you don’t have to. It reminded me of the sketchy used car lots to of past decades, which for good reason don’t exist much anymore.

Ordered gateway internet as I was informed would work at our address. Waited 5 weeks to get. Once setup password would not work took 5 hours to get an answer only to find out reception was poor. Took another 2 hours to make contact to send back and cancey account. Fast forward 4 weeks received bill for two months of use and never even used it. Contacted online only to be informed account was cancelled do to non payment and it would cost $74.00 to reinstate. Called number on bill for it to take  four people and another 2 hours to get straight. I hope. As the story goes nobody can give an answer your put on hold to talk to another person who never answers this happens again and again. Very decietfull. Worst company I've experienced in a long time.
Sprint, why did you sell out to T-Mobile? My reception was great until you allowed T- Mobile to take over. Now I have to stand outside to avoid dropped calls.

I’ve bought the so called bundle of Apple IPhones with the watches and for some reason, they can’t find my receipt for the Apple watches. One of my watches is locked and the Apple people needs proof of purchase to be able to unlock the watch. T-Mobile are tossing the ball at each other by saying that the store has the receipt, store says that the T-Mobile customer service  has it. I’ve been with T-Mobile almost 4yrs.

After a few years of expensive bliss, T-mobile demonstrated through a vehement and blatantly intentional odyssey of lies that phone trade ins, credits on the account, and a claim to fix everything that ended up false that they are a company built on hollow platitudes.

Tried to cancel service for two phones. Talked to a rep in the Philippines. Rep was of no help. First call went dead after 10 minutes on hold. They wanted to send text to dead phone number. Told me I had to go into a T-Mobile store. Rep in store was rude and not helpful. Horrible customer service.

I would say the worst company, the cheapest in terms of customer support, the worst staff, and almost every factor and element with this company is terrible. 
DO NOT BECOME THEIR CUSTOMERS. I think they should be considered as a corrupt company.

Attempting to switch from Verizon but having second thoughts after my experience with customer service rep.  Barely spoke English and had absolutely no idea what my issue was.  Issue is still not resolved.  Really disappointed.  It seems they are grabbing customers based on low cost services.

If I can write 0 star I would ! I am a service company and I can assure you that this T-Mobile has the worst service that I have experienced. If You try to call to handle a technical issue, you will get a person with zero technical knowledge and a rooster and bunch of chicken sound in the background ... the supervisors are worse than the original workers, and the upper management is not any better. Be ready to be on the phone for 4 to 5 hours on the phone for any simple request. STAY AWAY !

Horrible, Horrible, F-ing Horrible service. Ever since T mobile bought Sprint my service has been miserable. I can't finish a game of chess before my service dies over and over and over at any times during the day or night. It isnt because I get throttled because I used to much and traffic is high because it does it anytime from 3 AM to 3 PM. It's just a ripoff. Get another service. You were warned.

Horrible, horrible service!!! I’ve had TMobile for 2 years now and should’ve never left Verizon. Worst decision ever. I’m sick of their lies and false representation. I’ve been calling technical support for two years now and it never got fixed.

On April 3/4 I visited the T Mobile store at 14 mi rd and Schoenherr in Sterling Hgts, Mi to upgrade my phone.  I was waited on by Chris/Belle/Calvin all of whom I found to be very helpful and professional.

My husband and I had to get new numbers to conduct business after relocating from the Caribbean. We were Sprint customers so started with the 53rd Hyde Park Sprint store to make the change. Our rep was very good. When she transitioned to the T-Mobile store across the street we followed. She was amazing in handling our transition & so was her manager. The only problem we have had is the amount of scam calls we started to receive. They were looking for the previous individuals who had the numbers. We’ve NEVER had this problem before. It’s been disturbing and I know this should NOT have happened as it’s never happened before & businesses are even more tech savvy now. Like everyone we’ve had a lot going on so haven’t spoken with the manager about the problem yet but I will now that I’ve shared it in this review.

I have been with sprint 15 years me and my husband and since the merger and adding two lines I have been on the phone 45+ times with different issues they lie don’t fix things and are 100 dishonest. After all these years of being a loyal customer I’m just done with the lies and false fixes and charges never completely corrected. Oh and on to top that off the service sucks constantly dropping calls . Don’t even waste your time go with someone else.

If I could give 0 starts I would. I havent been able to make or receive calls for 4 to 5 months, paid my deductible to get a replacement phone. That one still had the same issue, they sent me a 2nd phone. Still same issue. They wouldnt fix it. Had to buy a new phone and pay full price.... and their excuse is that they have problems with the towers and everytime they said it wont happen again. I use to love tmobile but now i think its the worse.

Since T-Mobile and Sprint have merged. My mobile phone service has been terrible. For the twenty seven years. That I was a Sprint customer. There were moments that were not good. But overall their service outshines T-Mobiles. There is no comparison. T-Mobile sucks.

Signed up for a prepaid plan, it took 26 hours to complete (I had to stop by their office twice) because of some backoffice issue. Paid with my card issued by an American bank. Soon after that, went abroad, used the plan for a few weeks, roaming service was fine. Tried to add funds to my account online, using the same card, failed with the message"we do not accept international cards". Re-tried via automated phone system - same result. Contacted support, the agent tried to add funds manually using the same card - same result. The agent refused to ask for manager's help because "it wouldn't help anyways, we do not have access to credit cards".

Went to the T-Mobile in Wolf Ranch to get a new phone. The new phone did not work, and when I went to exchange it they said they would troubleshoot it. So they did and sent me on my way. The phone still kept cutting off on me, and when I went back within 14 days, they wanted a $40 restocking fee. I was there 3 hours and almost in tears before I was able to exchange the phone without a restocking fee. Why would I have to pay a restocking fee when the phone does not work? Makes no sense!!!!

Don't do it and don't add a line to your account. It's so many hidden fees it ridiculous. You can  pay your phone off and the bill and they will still hit you with $174 charge. Even if your My Sprint app says you owe $98 to pay the phone off you'll still be charged $174.And  even if you call and speak to someone and they say yes $98 you'll still be charged $174. My advice Don't do it also even if your phone is stolen and you have insurance you'll still on the hook for that phone make that make sense. Don't waste your money. And since the sprint merger with t-mobile when you get on the internet it's a 3-6 second pause so you will wright 3 letters but only one will come over u have to wait 3-6 seconds then u can type in the site you wish to connect with. It didn't start doing this until I installed the new t-mobile sim card.  I strongly say buy  your own phone 1st  before if you must be a sprint t-mobile customer. This is my last year when my phone is paid off I'm done pa Don't forget Don't add a spouse or friend to your account you'll be sorry if one month  they don't pay the bill your screwed. Don't do it from experience I paid my ex phone off and her past due balance the next day got a new bill  $348.19 Don't do it I can't make this stuff up. Been  with sprint since 2016 sprint and t-mobile hidden fees surprise bills on that as Don't waste your money real talk!!! Also long weight times and bogus information unexplained bills, and if your are reading this don't go to Aspen dental either especially the one on Kemper Road Cincinnati Ohio.

3/2021: T-Mobile WILL SHARE your user data with advertisers. They WILL TEMPORARILY let you opt out UNTIL THEY REQUEST periodic confirmation of your opt out choice. If you miss ONE confirmations request, T-Mobile will automatically switch your instructions to THEIR preferences. T-Mobile Management are untrustworthy, self serving, exploitive inconsiderates. 
Good luck in communication toward them. They've blocked off reception of these problems through managers who won't relay communication and emails ARE NOT ACCEPTED.

I was with T-Mobile for years and I upgraded to the new iPhone. I had terrible service and called customer service/tech support daily. As a disabled veteran I need my phone to work especially in this pandemic where doctors appointments are available via telehealth. I was missing vital appointments due to no service. I switched to VERIZON AND HAVE A PERFECT SIGNAL EVERYWHERE!

I signed up for a plan. They sent me SIMs with new #s. I tried accessing anything useful on their web site. Nothing. Although they were able to send me a bill the same day, there was no account on the web site that I could access. I spent 4+ hours on the phone trying to contact them, explaining that I didn't want new #s. They offered to do the transfer, but it could take 24 hours. I explained that these were business phones, and that was unacceptable. I asked FOUR times to cancel the service. They kept putting me on hold and making excuses, and finally disconnected me. Now I'm going to have to contest the credit card charges until they go away. The worst utility service I've ever encountered.

For the last two months T-mobile has been trying to charge me when i dropped their service they never could get right out of disgust. I never got to use the phone properly, was in the shop multiple times, Their phone service dept. Dropped me twice after waiting hours for a callback. The Key west store will lie to you, make excuses, And then just abandon you to the worst company and customer service I have EVER had in 66 years.

Switched to T-Mobile in November of 2020, have had nothing but problems with this company. The service is ridiculous, I literally have to go into mobile networks, change settings from 5g to 3g (which is ridiculous with my brand new $1200 Samsung s21 ultra 5g phone less than a month old) just to be able to get internet service with an unlimited plan.Also I have to call them every single month with the bill because they add $40 - $50 of unknown charges to my bill every month. I have to call and waste 1 hour of my time with them. It's the most ridiculous phone provider I have dealt with in my life

edits.text: Horrible company. I spent 2 hours with Representative David about plans and charges and told him I wasn't ready to switch providers yet and that I wanted to call the other larger providers before making a decision. After 2 hours of negotiating with me, he had promised me that Tmobile would give me free phones for all the lines being ported and would wave activation fees if I switched with them at that moment, the offers he was giving me were too good to be true so I questioned  him multiple times on his offer and every time he had same offer available to me and promised me there would be no surprises. He also told me the monthly bill would be $117 for all 4 lines with all taxes and service fees included. I got my 1st bill 2 weeks later, they were charging me $164 per month. For $30 per month for 24 months to pay for the FREE phones and they also added $12 per month for insurance which I did not agree to. They are scammers and they will lie and tell you whatever it takes to get you to agree, once you sign they screw you badly. I'm so disappointed in this company and now I see why they have a 1.5 star rating. If there was an option for negative stars thats what I would give them.Extremely passed off and unsatisfied.

text:
Switched over to T-Mobile in September. Was told by the store customer service they will cover the activation charges. Activation charges were not covered. Service was inadequate... dropped phone calls, bad reception. Contacted multiple times about signal issues. They lied and said its a temporary thing around my house. The issues persisted. Early March called them and told them I want to port out my numbers, they said the bill will be prorated. Two weeks ago they charged me for the full bill. I called again was on the phone for 6 hours eventually was told I will get a refund, week later no refund, called again was told there will be a refund, guess what NO F^$&*NG REFUND. Called again Monday, was told they will pull phone calls and verify I will get a refund if they can verify that the rep told me that I will be prorated. Just received a call from the telling me I am not getting a refund because the rep told me that i will get prorated was "incorrect" and lied to me so there is no refund.
F&^K YOU T-MOBILE!!!!!!!!!

Edit:  Finaly was able to get them to send me all of the bills through the 5 months and 5 days of service.  They will still not refund me and told me that outright.   However i do have bills for 6 months and 5 days and will be submitting to my bank for a dispute of the last payment.
TMobile customer service is the absolute worst. The agents are in the Philippines and can barely speak English. If I could rate them a zero, I would.

If I could give t-mobile a minus 10 review I would. They sold me a plan that they did not honor and then proceeded to jack up my rates. They sold me a watch that was "supposed" to arrive the next day... two months from now is my expected date for shipment now (meanwhile I'm paying on the watch). Wait until they receive a letter from my families corporate law office. Anyone out there want to start a class action suit? They have told me to go to an attorney if I want access to their recorded conversations with me.

Switched from Sprint and was offered a free phone for adding a second line. Got the first bill and, yup, they charged me for the 'free' phone. I called and they said 'we don't remember that promotion'. So, I paid $200+ for a 'free' POS Revvl+. The phone began to fail within days. I asked for a replacement under warranty, they said 'Sure, that will be $190, how would you like to pay?' Wait, what? Taxes, fees, activation fees, etc. etc.
No thanks.
I had an old iPhone 7+, so I told them to send me a SIM card, so I could use that one instead.
The SIM card arrived today. I installed it and followed instructions. Didn't work. Used the app chat for help.
After an hour and after the Tmobile employee disabled BOTH phones, she abandoned the chat and left.
'Eunice' disppeared and neither of my T-Mobile phones worked.
I still can't believe a company would do that to a customer.
Took another hour with another tech to fix both phones.
It's good that T-Mobile merged with Sprint, because they belong together. Two of the worst companies on the planet.
I'll be leaving T-Mobile ASAP.

Transferred over from Sprint to Tmobile. In 2018 purchased two phones. I was told that the lease was only going to be 18 months.  After the lease was over, I continued to be charged $55 for the phones. I called Sprint and Tmobile multiple times and nothing was mentioned about the month-to-month lease on the phones after the completion of the 18 months.  I have been paying $55 for an additional 18 months and now I am out of $990.

Bad services. Bad connection. Low 4G LTE. 
Contract Essential plan with 3 lines for $ 90, 50GB high speed.  High Speed ​​does not exceed 1.2 MBS.  The "expert" Technical Service says that my phones are not compatible with their LTE, I must change them for new ones (I have an Iphone 8 and two Iphone 7 Plus, and with my old company they could reach up to 30 MBP).  Don't take T-Mobile, it's garbage.

Originally a sprint customer (which was bad) now a t-mobile customer, which is just terrible. Had sprint/t-mobile illegally add a line to my account when I was just switching my sim card post-merger. Took several months of customer service to get the line canceled and my money back. Now dealing with the fact that when I went to buy out my lease phone I was told it was 120, a week later they're saying it should've been 190 and I'm magically $80 past due (have never had a late payment). Literally a joke for a company and that's not even mentioning their garbage service for both call and data.
Nearly all employees of this company are poorly trained and it's all about the numbers (have had to hear their terrible meeting calls in the morning daily from a inconsiderate employee that would put it on speaker and sit outside at my apt). 
Not worth the money, use someone else.

If i could give them zero stars I would!!!! 

I talked to 5 different people and every single on of them is saying something different. Calling customer service is one of the MOST frustrating thing ever they will not help you. They are so useless no one seems to know anything. They will be so quick to take your money but not to help you with any issues you might be having especially billing issues!

I would give them 0 stars. The most horrific experience after being their customer for 11 years almost ... Worst customer service with people that are lying in your face when actually don't want or cannot resolve your issues, worst signal and especially if you have a 5G phone don't expect to have 5G signal anywhere.  Also I've bought a $1400 Samsung Galaxy from them and after only  3 months didn't work properly and they've done nothing for 6 months of complaining.  In the end they changed it with a refurbished one. So please do yourself a favor find a better option, my experience was traumatic as I lost many days on the phone with them, not hours, in 6 months I've lost days!!!! Just yesterday the whole day until past midnight when I was done with them for good.
T mobile app is not user friendly. It's a search nightmare. Round and round you go getting nowhere and no accurate answers.

If you are thinking about using T-mobile, DON'T!  I have been trying to clear up a mistake on THEIR part since January 11, 2021.  I returned a defective phone that does not work and tracking number shows it was delivered to T-mobile warehouse in Texas.  They are still trying to charge me for the defective phone that clearly shows it has been delivered to their warehouse.  So far, I have spoken to over 25 representatives and several supervisors.  Now they are saying that the IMEI # for the defective phone shows it is still in use.  Firstly, the defective phone is incapable of being used.  Secondly, a supervisor confirmed the IMEI # of the phone being used does not match the IMEI # they are showing is being used.  Even with all of this proof, T-mobile still wants to charge me for a phone that I clearly do not have.  This has been an on-going hassle that I have to keep taking time off of work to resolve and nobody at T-mobile seems to be component enough to resolve an issue that should be easily handled.  Now I am being advised to email corporate and see if they can resolve.  This has already went through several people, departments and still has not been resolved despite the obvious proof I have.  This has been beyond exhausting and frustrating.  Do NOT use T-mobile for anything!

Does t-Mobile care???  We're told the cell service at our location is not yet acceptable.  Appreciated this.  But we did try to switch our internet service from Satellite to T-M's tower internet.  Only 2 bars, but it has been great, much faster & consistent!!!!!!!!!!!!!
So we needed to switch from Satellite VOIP on home phone.  That has led to a horrible customer service experience!!!!  First off there is only the 800-937-8997 is the only # available and it goes to whoever answers, most of whom know nothing of your issue even though I've repeated #'s  & issues umpteen times.  In fact, most 'answerers' don't seem to know T-M has the service.
 And WAIT is the name of the game, & every time you get moved 'up' (if that is what it is', the info never goes to them!!!  And call backs are a farce.  I've spent equivalent of 16 hrs. on the phone & waiting, and still no solution.  Did get a callback but had a motor running so did not hear.   Do they leave a call back #??? NO!!!  Only available is the one I started out with!!!  And that is to start over.  30 minutes turns into hours.  Go on the website & try to find assistance-- you will find the single number of above.
Will we switch our cell phones to T-M when they can offer cell service here????  They will have to assure us that they care about Customer Service!

With T-Mobile protection plan you get stuck paying for the service and the replacement phone. When you place a claim, they create an untrackable return package and then charge you for the broken phone even though you return it. It feels like a scam. Shame on you T-Mobile.

I was sent a defective phone in the mail. When I called to get a replacement phone, I was told they were sending me an email with labels to send my device back. I spoke with 3 different reprentatives who said they sent me the email , but I never received it. Then later they told me that it may  take 24 hours to get the email. I spoke with 3 different people by phone and wasted a full Sunday on this. I will be switching providers.

I'd give T-mobile costumer care 0/10. I made a purchase on March 23rd for US phone number/SIM card and unlimited internet plan (since I just moved to the US and still don't have us phone number). I chose the $12 one day shipping option and until now, March 28th, I still haven't received my order. I've been contacting t-mobile thru chat for DAYS now and ask for the updates on my order. and none of the reps were being helpful. I explained to them that it has been almost a week since I made my order and I still haven't recieved it and told them that when I contacted UPS and gave them my tracking number, they told me T-mobile created shipping label DAYS ago but still haven't sent out the package to UPS. so T-mobile told me they would transfer me to this department this department  this department and NONE of them could give me the answer about my order's whereabout. After days of chatting/calling the costumer care and none of them were being helpful I tried to cancel my order since it's been too long and  I paid extra for one day shipping option and I still haven't received my order, THEY DID NOT LET ME CANCEL MY ORDER AND GIVE ME REFUNDS. I don't know what on earth Is going on with you guys. I paid more than $100 for my order and I still haven't received it and none of your reps could give me the answer for why I have not received my order either! I guess I made a big mistake when I chose T-mobile over Verizon.

Service sucks. Never picks up a phone and that bad experience is accentuated by the voice recording bragging how good their team of experts are. Then when you get on e on chat, they are first liners who transfer you into a black hole. Or they send you a link which is a multi-page booklet. I'll be leaving soon.

This is the works experience I ever had with T-Mobile/Sprint I moved over to Verizon yesterday kind of a terrible service of t-Mobile/Sprint please do not go to the T-Mobile store Because the service with them are  they are terrible I would not recommend going to them the worst customer service the worst phone service in the worst service ever I ever have with a phone advisor. The people were very rude they did not want to help because I want to close down my account and they need and want to help me at all they tell you lies on live chat that’s not true I would not recommend spring/T-Mobile there  the most worst phone service in the world world

I went through 3 days waiting to resolve the purchase of iPad 8 plus and a Samsung Tablet. After 7 years with T-Mobile this was my first difficult experience. With that being said I decided to call T-Mobile about this situation and the T-Mobile Professional, Exceptional,Patient, Alexus in Birmingham, was an absolute Gem in resolving a three day frustrating experience. I am a retired Accounting Manager from a multi franchise organization and Trust me when I tell you, T-Mobile, You have the Best of the Best in this young lady! She turned an absolute mess into a, “ I love T-Mobile moment! “ if I were not retired I’d be trying to steal Alexus from you as I know from experience how very difficult it is to find anyone with the ability to change a customers state of emotions from zero to 60 in just a few moments. It’s important to Employees to know the impact they’ve had in the company that keeps your customers coming back. It’s not the product it’s the Representatives that keep your customers with T-Mobile. 
Thank You Alexus!

Store # 4FSQ 1255 S Broad St. Wallingford, Ct 06492...  This review is about an employee at this store who's name is Emily..she is awesome and the girl to go to if you have any questions or issues about your phone service what so ever...she gave me phenomenal customer service and we cannot thank her enough ... She is a sweetheart. She even showed me how to copy text on my phone...L & L

NO STARS!  Horrible company; totally unprofessional.  I paid for the phone upfront but they will NOT send a receipt (but I got a detailed invoice from the credit company) and are now trying to charge me monthly for a phone that I already paid for. I now have to put everything in dispute with the credit card company.
DON'T BUY FROM THIS COMPANY

Thieves. 
Do not use T Mobile. They are by far the worst corporation I am dealing with. If there would be a a below 0 scale my negative experience # would be infinite. 
Tmobile is stealing from me. They owe me $650 since December 2020. Although the items are back in their warehouse they refuse to pay me back. I’ve called 14 times already, each time a duration between 1-2 hours. Worst part, multiple times connection got disrupted and those fraudulent people don’t care at all about my problem because they don’t even call me back. I would have to go through the entire process again and again explaining myself my situation each time over and over. This institution hires a cal center in India or something where I mostly struggle to understand and make them understand. So far, every single person i talked to does not know what they are doing. Either in call center or here in USA. They claim that they put customer first, but I can prove that this is just a lie to gain your business. We are in a pandemic. I am a father with a child and a wife. I depend on my money as I work very hard. This huge wealthy corporation takes advantages. Refuses to pay me my $650 back on what I have to pay interest every month. 
They will steel from you, they will take advantage of you.

they didn't help me at all.
joey was the person who was giving me "help" was VERY rude and didn't answer any of my questions. unacceptable. this is very bad and I just want to get service that work with KIND customer service people.

I just swapped everything over to another provider after a horrible customer service call with T-Mobile/Sprint. One horrible customer service call too many, I might add. I honestly don’t know why anyone would stay with them. I bought a new watch, which is the 8th line on my account so I pay a hefty bill each month for my family. They said they could not activate it, but she could use it with Bluetooth. One of the reasons for purchasing the one I did was so, it could be used cellular. I called the other provider and received SIM cards in the mail two days later. Ported the numbers over so, no one had to change numbers and activated the new watch within an hour of receiving the SIM cards and happiness has been restored in my home! Do not change to T-Mobile, you will regret it!

I just joined TMobile from a lifetime Sprint customer, thinking I would be dealing with the same network since the two companies merged. I was lured by their 55+ deal. I haven't even made it one month! I can't download the app, I can't get online to sign up for auto-pay so I can't get the $10 discount and when I call in, I wait an hour only to get disconnected TWICE!! Not only that but their technicians are from the Philippines and you can barely hear them over a crackling phone line and their accent is so strong and they talk so fast you can't understand them! I am so frustrated!

lousy 5g connection and slow LTE in the supposed leader in 5g t mobile, slow texting, slow data slow for apps to open, choppy calls, in Long Beach California and in surrounding areas, their tv adds claiming the best network and giving people 650 buck or some free phone is the biggest gimmick they are over loaded with customers the network cant handle this so things are failing, I went to verizon and pay 30 bucks less a month and have a real 5g ultra wide band and nation wide 5g and works fantastic... DONT FALL FOR T MOBILE/SPRINT CLAIMING THE LEADER IN 5G AND BIGGEST FAST NETWORK, CUSTOMERS BEWARE!!! see for yourself if you dont trust me, my iPhone 12 Pro max has real 5g now with verizon not the blind leading the blind network t mobile/sprint..

edits.text: seems like since the merger with sprint data and calls gone worse to worser since December 2020 and all the t mobile tv commercials saying biggest 5g network??? where is the 5g in Long Beach california and surrounding cities???? looks like im headed to verizon wireless... t mobile/sprint network feels like the blind leading the blind network sorry t mobile just the truth tired of the fake 5g tv adds and no 5g any place near where I live and work..

text:
Very dissatisfied with Sprint/T-Mobile Service.
Keep us hostage. Porches a new phone $1200 value. Rrade is Samsung 8 S $800  value in excellent condition. The new phone is not working in Conifer. They don't want to  take it back after only 7 days. Be careful, when you trade a phone in that phone is T Mobile property. No advice about that when we purchases the phone. We are out of $600,we don't have a working phone and after 3 weeks we figure out that nowbady at T Mobile cares.

Well right now as we speak, I am on hold for tech support. It's been 20 minutes now, and the hold music is still playing, even while I'm typing this message.
My issue is webguard (I'm knocking on 30, so I shouldn't have this on my phone to begin with). But they put it on without telling me.
Can't view websites, so called them to remove it. They did, but a couple weeks later it came back on. The phone operators are rude as hell. Stay AS FAR AWAY from these guys forever.
Just pay the extra for any other phone service but these guys.
Hopefully this is what's considered a "useful enough review".
P.S. I'm still on hold.
I have been waiting for 23 minutes already on the phone to talk with a representative, I called yesterday and it was the same problem

I'm VERY disappointed in a certain mobile phone service for not only their lack of customer service, but their shady business model and blatant thievery.

So here, I'm airing my grievance because it goes to show how when a company gets big enough...they stop worrying about their customers and start worrying about their bottom line - money. My first point - don't run your business that way. Even if you're a multi-million dollar company, NEVER forget that your customers are your lifeblood. If you make them feel worthless or not cared for, you're going to inevitably fail.

My husband and I switched from T-Mobile in January. We paid our final bill, which was $236. We have proof of that. The girl said she cancelled the account (which should have already been done upon us porting over our numbers). She said it was the final bill and we wouldn't be receiving anything else from T-Mobile. I specifically asked because they had burned me before and screwed over at least three people I know, including my poor grandmother in the past.

We stopped receiving texts, emails and notifications from T-Mobile. I figured "Cool. We're done with them."

But then suddenly, this month, our "final bill" went to collections and we are suddenly owing $236 again. Our account? STILL OPEN??? After we ported all of our numbers and paid our final bill with a person over the phone and have the receipt and confirmation of such.

Turns out, the rep did NOT close the account even though she said she did. We've been removed from all communication with T-Mobile so we didn't receive any bill updates or notification that there was even an account still open. Either she's an idiot who doesn't know how to do her job or she intentionally left it open to make the company more money. Now, I have an inside connection at T-Mobile who has said they've been encouraged to do this. I can't confirm if that's what happened here, but I do know people close to me who work there say anytime they can turn a buck, they do.

Shame on you, T-Mobile. This is now the THIRD time I've tried to break up with you guys and your greediness is disgusting. I should have known when I switched from Verizon back to T-Mobile a couple years ago that it was the worst decision of my life. I see you. You fooled me twice. NEVER again.

I'm convinced the "T" in T-Mobile stands for TRASH. Trash customer service. Trash cell phone service and a Trash business model that takes advantage of people during a pandemic.

I said what I said.

Website, store and on-line service are USELESS... I'm a Sprint customer trying to get a T Mobile plan and can't seem to do it without wasting time. The clerks at the store pretty much blew us off, the on-line chat is in a loop where I can't log in and, after 20 minutes on the phone, I got tired of waiting.

T-Mobile/Sprint are thieves. They charge my card at random every month and I have to call and spend hours getting them removed. Been with the company for 10 yrs. Paid off my phone for $800 just so I would not have to deal with them again. Now they won’t unlock my phone even though own it outright.

We have had 3 lines on tmobile service for past 8 years. Recently found cheaper service and transferred number on one line, the other 2 got new numbers. So being that we have no longer been using the service, I called to cancel. Waited approximately 50 minutes to speak to a live person just so she could tell me I needed to call on the first of the month so I wouldn't incur TERMINATION FEES... WE ARE UNDER NO CONTRACT, SO WHY WOULD THEY HAVE ANY RIGHT TO CHARGE SUCH A THING!? I JUST WANT THE LINES CANCELED! Now have to wait another 2 weeks to remember to call back n hope get a hold of someone before the 2nd, which will start another monthly bill! Never again after this!!! TMobile is full of games and can barely understand the customer service agents with there deep accents once you finally get off of hold.

Coverage is trash specifically in my area. I called one of the tech guys and he notified me that in my area specifically(SoCal Ventura county) there was only %30 coverage. For %30 coverage I should only pay them %30 price for their service. Absolute garbage customer service. Waiting on the phone to speak to a human being for hours on end. This company might as well be ran by the government by how hard it sucks. "If the DMV decided to start a cellular company it would be T Mobile" is the best way I can describe it. Do yourself a favor and get Cricket. Cricket had better coverage.
